# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      approved_by:
        description: 'Approval ticket/PR number'
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, security-scanner]
    outputs:
      validation_passed: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.passed }}
      sanitized_build_script: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_script }}
      sanitized_deploy_command: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.deploy_command }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Validate approval
        id: validate_approval
        run: |
          APPROVAL="${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}"
          if [[ ! "$APPROVAL" =~ ^(PR|TICKET)-[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "Invalid approval format. Must be PR-#### or TICKET-####"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Approval validated: $APPROVAL"

      - name: Security scan inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}"
          
          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            "rm -rf /"
            "dd if="
            "mkfs"
            ":(){ :|:& };:"
            "curl.*|.*sh"
            "wget.*|.*sh"
            "eval"
            "exec"
            "/dev/sd"
            "shutdown"
            "reboot"
            "init 0"
            "init 6"
            "> /dev/"
            "chmod 777"
            "chown root"
            "sudo su"
            "nc -l"
            "ncat -l"
            "/etc/passwd"
            "/etc/shadow"
            "iptables -F"
          )
          
          check_dangerous_patterns() {
            local input="$1"
            for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
              if echo "$input" | grep -iE "$pattern" > /dev/null; then
                echo "Dangerous pattern detected: $pattern"
                return 1
              fi
            done
            return 0
          }
          
          if ! check_dangerous_patterns "$BUILD_SCRIPT"; then
            echo "Build script contains dangerous patterns"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ -n "$DEPLOY_CMD" ]; then
            if ! check_dangerous_patterns "$DEPLOY_CMD"; then
              echo "Deploy command contains dangerous patterns"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi
          
          if echo "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | grep -E '(\$\(|\`|&&|\|\||;)' > /dev/null; then
            echo "Build script contains shell injection patterns"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ -n "$DEPLOY_CMD" ] && echo "$DEPLOY_CMD" | grep -E '(\$\(|\`|&&|\|\||;)' > /dev/null; then
            echo "Deploy command contains shell injection patterns"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "passed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Sanitize inputs
        id: sanitize
        run: |
          sanitize_input() {
            local input="$1"
            echo "$input" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._\/-]//g'
          }
          
          BUILD_SCRIPT=$(sanitize_input "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}")
          DEPLOY_CMD=$(sanitize_input "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}")
          
          echo "build_script=$BUILD_SCRIPT" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "deploy_command=$DEPLOY_CMD" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Verify scripts exist in repository
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_script }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Build script not found in repository: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ ! -x "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Build script is not executable: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [[ "$BUILD_SCRIPT" == ../* ]] || [[ "$BUILD_SCRIPT" == */../* ]]; then
            echo "Path traversal detected in build script"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Static analysis
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_script }}"
          
          if command -v shellcheck &> /dev/null; then
            shellcheck "$BUILD_SCRIPT" || echo "Shellcheck warnings detected"
          fi
          
          if grep -r "password\|secret\|token\|api_key" "$BUILD_SCRIPT" | grep -v "PASSWORD_FILE\|SECRET_FILE"; then
            echo "Potential hardcoded secrets detected"
            exit 1
          fi

  build:
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, build-runner, "${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"]
    timeout-minutes: 60
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup isolated environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}
          cd /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}
          
          export WORKSPACE="/tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}"
          export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
          export HOME="/tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}/home"
          mkdir -p "$HOME"
          
          echo "WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "BUILD_HOME=$HOME" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Copy source to isolated workspace
        run: |
          cp -r ${{ github.workspace }}/* ${{ env.WORKSPACE }}/
          cd ${{ env.WORKSPACE }}

      - name: Set resource limits
        run: |
          ulimit -t 3600
          ulimit -v 8388608
          ulimit -n 1024
          ulimit -u 512

      - name: Execute build script
        run: |
          cd ${{ env.WORKSPACE }}
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate.outputs.sanitized_build_script }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "Build script not found: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          timeout 3600 bash -c "set -euo pipefail; ./$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        env:
          CI: true
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          BUILD_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          APPROVAL_ID: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}

      - name: Scan build artifacts
        run: |
          cd ${{ env.WORKSPACE }}
          
          if [ -d "dist" ] || [ -d "build" ] || [ -d "target" ]; then
            echo "Scanning build artifacts for secrets..."
            
            find . -type f \( -name "*.jar" -o -name "*.war" -o -name "*.zip" -o -name "*.tar.gz" \) -prune -o -type f -print0 | \
              xargs -0 grep -l "password\|secret\|api_key\|private_key" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.WORKSPACE }}/dist
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Cleanup workspace
        if: always()
        run: |
          cd /tmp
          rm -rf /tmp/build-${{ github.run_id }}

  deploy:
    needs: [validate, build]
    if: github.event.inputs.deploy_command != ''
    runs-on: [self-hosted, deploy-runner, "${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"]
    timeout-minutes: 30
    environment: 
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
      url: https://${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify deployment prerequisites
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" == "production" ]; then
            if [ "${{ github.actor }}" != "approved-deployer" ]; then
              echo "Only approved deployers can deploy to production"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/deploy-${{ github.run_id }}
          export DEPLOY_WORKSPACE="/tmp/deploy-${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "DEPLOY_WORKSPACE=$DEPLOY_WORKSPACE" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Validate deployment command
        run: |
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ needs.validate.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}"
          
          ALLOWED_COMMANDS=(
            "deploy.sh"
            "scripts/deploy.sh"
            "bin/deploy"
            "deployment/deploy.sh"
          )
          
          COMMAND_ALLOWED=false
          for allowed in "${ALLOWED_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [ "$DEPLOY_CMD" == "$allowed" ]; then
              COMMAND_ALLOWED=true
              break
            fi
          done
          
          if [ "$COMMAND_ALLOWED" != "true" ]; then
            echo "Deploy command not in allowlist: $DEPLOY_CMD"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Execute deployment
        run: |
          DEPLOY_CMD="${{ needs.validate.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}"
          
          if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_CMD" ]; then
            echo "Deploy script not found: $DEPLOY_CMD"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          timeout 1800 bash -c "set -euo pipefail; ./$DEPLOY_CMD"
        env:
          CI: true
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}
          DEPLOY_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          ARTIFACTS_PATH: ./artifacts
          APPROVAL_ID: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Deployment completed for environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Approval: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}"
          echo "Deployed by: ${{ github.actor }}"

      - name: Cleanup deployment workspace
        if: always()
        run: |
          cd /tmp
          rm -rf /tmp/deploy-${{ github.run_id }}

  audit:
    needs: [validate, build, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, audit-runner]
    steps:
      - name: Log execution
        run: |
          echo "Workflow execution audit log"
          echo "=============================="
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Approval: ${{ github.event.inputs.approved_by }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Build script: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.sanitized_build_script }}"
          echo "Deploy command: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.sanitized_deploy_command }}"
          echo "Build status: ${{ needs.build.result }}"
          echo "Deploy status: ${{ needs.deploy.result }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          
          logger -t github-actions "Workflow ${{ github.run_id }} executed by ${{ github.actor }} for ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"

      - name: Send notification
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "Security alert: Workflow ${{ github.run_id }} failed security checks"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
